name: Molletes or Mexican Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread in half and lightly butter one side.
2. Toast the rolls in an oven until lightly browned.
3. Spread refried beans onto the toasted side of the bread.
4. Sprinkle Oaxaca cheese over the beans.
5. Return to the oven just until the cheese begins to brown.
6. Top with Salsa Fresca.
Salsa Fresca or "Pico de Gallo":
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Let stand for a few minutes for flavors to blend.
